subcodes.first_line: This is a remembrance from Our presence unto those who dwell upon the earth, that it may draw them unto the Most Exalted Horizon and bring them nigh unto God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن علی الارض لیجذبهم الندآء الی الافق الاعلی و یقربهم الی الله
subcodes.subjects: @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
